title: Inheritance PASS: [107] QA_CORE_SPEC.v1 → [112] QA_OBSTRUCTION_COMPILER_BRIDGE_CERT.v1
_fixture_purpose: Certifies the kernel inheritance edge for [112], the obstruction-compiler bridge. [112] is a family_extension of [107] — it respects the full gate policy [0..5] and adds bridge-specific failure types (ARITHMETIC_FAMILY_MISMATCH, CONTROL_FAMILY_MISMATCH, OBSTRUCTION_VERDICT_WRONG, FORBIDDEN_TARGET_REACHABILITY_CLAIM) on top of the kernel failure algebra. Note: [112] is the first 'bridge' family, which cross-references two sibling families ([111] and [106]) rather than inheriting from them. The cross-references are expressed as domain ref fields, not as inheritance edges; this cert only covers the [107]→[112] kernel inheritance edge. IC5 fires (child has non-empty failure algebra that extends parent). IC6-IC7 skipped (no logging contract or invariant refs in [112] v1).

validation_checks.description: parent family schema version is a recognised QA cert family
child family schema version is a recognised QA cert family
child gate policy is superset of parent gate policy
child failure algebra extends parent without deleting required types
validation_checks.details: parent types all present; child adds ARITHMETIC_FAMILY_MISMATCH, CONTROL_FAMILY_MISMATCH, MODULUS_MISMATCH, PRIME_NOT_INERT, TARGET_OUT_OF_RANGE, OBSTRUCTION_VERDICT_WRONG, FORBIDDEN_TARGET_REACHABILITY_CLAIM

validation_checks.description: child logging contract includes move, fail_type, invariant_diff
validation_checks.details: SKIPPED — child logging_required_fields empty; IC6 conditional skip applies

validation_checks.description: child preserves_invariants refs resolve against parent invariant names
validation_checks.details: SKIPPED — child preserves_invariants_refs empty; IC7 conditional skip applies
